title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 529.010 - Return made to first writ
text:
529.010.  Return made to first writ. — Where any writ of mandamus shall be issued out of any court in this state, or by any judge thereof in vacation, directed and delivered to any person who, by law, is required to make return of such writ, such person shall make his return to the first writ of mandamus.
(RSMo 1939 § 1696) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1532; 1919 § 1982; 1909 § 2546
